prompt: Create a cinematic wide-angle fashion editorial photograph of a young Black man with braided cornrows standing in full-body side profile on a dark volcanic black-sand beach at blue hour, facing right toward towering jagged sea stacks. He wears an oversized futuristic puffer jacket with bold black, white, and pale aqua color-block panels, black track pants with three thin white side stripes, and chunky white sculptural sneakers. Add a small semi-transparent square blur censor block over his face while leaving the braids and silhouette visible. The environment is moody and surreal: deep blue twilight sky, wet dark sand, low ground mist drifting around his feet, and a bright cold light flare near the horizon behind him, partially hidden by the rocks. Compose the person on the left third of a 16:9 frame, with three distinct sharp black rock spires dominating the right side and background. Use shallow cinematic depth of field, realistic lens flare, high contrast, cool teal-blue color grading, dramatic backlighting, soft haze, and a premium sportswear campaign aesthetic. No text, no logos, no extra people.
